category_sources: source_facts.description says Core application library for C; official GTK architecture page describes GLib as a general-purpose portable utility library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glib; official docs title uses GLib.
docs_sources: Official docs.gtk.org GLib API reference and GTK architecture page are the official GLib documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: Official GTK GLib architecture page says the GLib source is available on GNOME GitLab at https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/glib.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GLib docs describe C application building blocks, data types, main loop, GObject, GIO, and GNOME/GTK context.
